summary: Iter-118 frontend smoke + Restart-Tour verification PASS. /admin, /notary/dashboard, /dashboard all load cleanly after refactor — no ChunkLoadError, no runtime/page errors. AdminDashboard exposes admin-stats-grid (5 KPI cards), admin-tabs-nav (7 tabs), header-blueprint-btn, ron-compliance-btn, header-refresh-btn. NotaryDashboard tabs Available/My Requests/History switch without runtime error. PlatformFooter renders [data-testid=footer-build-version]='Build 2026-05-27 · v3' on every page. OnboardingTour auto-fires on fresh localStorage with correct portal badge (Command Authority Suite / Client Sovereign Hub). UserDropdown 'Restart tour' button at [data-testid=user-dropdown-restart-tour] correctly removes the portal localStorage key and re-triggers the tour with the correct portal badge.

issues: Console warning: 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' from Dashboard render. Non-blocking but should be fixed — most likely a list .map() missing key= in Dashboard.jsx.

action_items: Fix missing key prop in Dashboard.jsx list render (React warning, non-blocking).
critical_code_review_comments: OnboardingTour overlay (data-testid=onboarding-overlay) is z-[10000] full-screen and intercepts pointer events on the AdminDashboard until the user dismisses or completes the tour. This is intentional, but during E2E test runs a fresh-localStorage admin login will block all tab/header button clicks for ~the first tour. Recommend the playbook for future testing agents: pre-set the three nc_tour_*_v1 localStorage keys before navigating, or always dismiss tour before interacting. Restart-tour button itself works correctly even after dropdown is opened (z-index 50 dropdown menu sits above page but tour overlay is launched after click which closes the dropdown — verified OK).

UserDropdown 'Restart tour' implementation calls resetOnboarding(portal) then either reloads or navigates to canonical path — confirmed via localStorage inspection that nc_tour_command_authority_v1 was set to 'done' and became null after the click, and the tour tooltip then mounted with badge 'COMMAND AUTHORITY SUITE'. Clean.
PlatformFooter build-version testid resolves cleanly on /admin, /notary/dashboard, /dashboard — text exactly 'Build 2026-05-27 · v3'.
ErrorBoundary Sentry dynamic-import removal: no ChunkLoadError observed on /admin; root cause fix confirmed.

NotaryDashboard RequestCard testids (accept-<id>, start-session-<id>, complete-<id>, eye-open) could not be observed in this run because notarytest@test.com had zero rendered request cards in any of the 3 tabs at test time — not a code bug, just no seed data hits. To verify these testids end-to-end, next iteration should seed a notary request assigned to notarytest@test.com and re-run.
Dashboard.jsx has a list render missing the 'key' prop — React warning fires twice on /dashboard mount. Trivial fix.

success_rate.frontend: Verified: /admin smoke ✓, /notary/dashboard smoke ✓, /dashboard smoke ✓, footer-build-version ✓, OnboardingTour auto-fire ✓, Restart-tour dropdown ✓, AdminDashboard testids + 5 KPI stats + 7 tab buttons ✓. Not directly verified due to missing notary seed data: accept-/start-session-/complete-/Eye on RequestCard + RequestDetailModal contents (AI co-pilot / journal / blockchain sections). UserDetailsModal Enable/Disable not directly clicked because tour overlay was intercepting clicks during the run (auto-tour on fresh login).

test_credentials: Admin admin@notarychain.com/Admin123!, Notary notarytest@test.com/Test123!, Client demo@test.com/Demo123!
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend public URL = https://notary-chain-preview-3.preview.emergentagent.com. Login route is /login (not /auth — /auth redirects to /login). Email input has placeholder 'you@example.com'. To suppress auto-tour during dashboard interaction tests, pre-set localStorage keys nc_tour_command_authority_v1 / nc_tour_assurance_v1 / nc_tour_client_sovereign_v1 to any non-empty value BEFORE navigating. The OnboardingTour overlay (z-[10000]) will block tab/button clicks until dismissed — this is by design. To exercise NotaryDashboard RequestCard accept-/start-session-/complete- testids and the RequestDetailModal contents, first create a notary request assigned to notarytest@test.com (or pick up from Available queue) via the API or client flow.
rca of the issue: No outstanding bugs from this iter. The 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' warning on /dashboard is a minor lint-grade issue in Dashboard.jsx — find the .map() that renders the upcoming-requests / member-since / vault items list and add key={item.id || idx}. Two warnings fired on a single mount so likely two adjacent .map() calls. Non-blocking.
